LanguageData.EndGame_Annunciator.label: Heart Chamber
LanguageData.EndGame_Annunciator.description: The process of disabling the safeguards to harness the heart's power would be lengthy, and 15 days would be needed before the full power would be accessible. The magicka eminated during this process would be felt across the continent, and many would seek to control it. Preparations for a constant assault would be necessary...
